title: How Senior Engineers Actually Build With AI in 2026 | Build a Full Stack Systems Architecture App
summary: A full-stack SaaS development tutorial showing architecture-first workflow with AI agents, proper context management, and deployment using Next.js, Prisma, Postgres, TypeScript, and Tailwind. Covers authentication, real-time collaboration via Liveblocks, automated workflows with Trigger.dev, and AI-driven spec generation for systems architecture design.
